chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ الَّذِي أَحْيَاهُ عِيسَى ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE ONE WHO WAS BROUGHT BACK TO LIFE BY ISA<sup>as</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 494)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 494)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ مَنْ يُرِدْ فِيهِ بِإِلْحادٍ بِظُلْمٍ فَقَالَ مَنْ عَبَدَ فِيهِ غَيْرَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَوْ تَوَلَّى فِيهِ غَيْرَ أَوْلِيَاءِ اللَّهِ فَهُوَ مُلْحِدٌ بِظُلْمٍ وَ عَلَى اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى أَنْ يُذِيقَهُ مِنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ.

en.hubeali: H 14980 – Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Walladin, and someone else from our companions, who have reported the following:

Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Statement of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic: “[22:25] and whoever shall incline therein to wrong unjustly, We will make him taste of a painful chastisement”, so heasws said: ‘The one who worships other than Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic, or befriends other than the Guardiansasws from Allahazwj, so he has inclined to injustice and it is upon Allahazwj Blessed and High to make him taste of a painful chastisement”.
en.sarwar: 534. Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ja’far Al-Howl, from Sallam Bin Al-Mustaneer, who has reported the following: Abu Ja’far (a.s.) regarding the Statement of Allah (azwj) Blessed and High: “[22:40] Those who have been expelled from their homes without a just cause except that they say: Our Lord is Allah”. He (a.s.) said: ‘It was Revealed regarding the Rasool Allah (saww), and Ali (a.s.), and Hamza (ar), and Ja’far (ar), and it flowed regarding Al-Husayn (a.s.), may Peace be upon all of them’.
